subcodes.first_line: O Jamshid! The Cup of Jam hath come in its season and become the Mirror of Alexander, bestowing the wine of life and joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جمشید جام جم است که بدور آمده و آاینه سکندر گشته باده حیات بخشد و حبور
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @love of God
